title: Clarifications for Ed25519, Ed448, X25519, and X448 Algorithm Identifiers
source: Limited Additional Mechanisms for PKIX and SMIME
abstract: This document updates RFC 8410 to clarify existing semantics, and specify missing semantics, for key usage bits when used in certificates that support the Ed25519, Ed448, X25519, and X448 Elliptic Curve Cryptography algorithms.
